front.title: Authorization Evidence and Audit Trail for OAuth 2.0 Access Tokens

abstract.t: This specification defines an authorization details type for including authorization evidence and audit trail information in OAuth 2.0 access tokens using the Rich Authorization Requests (RAR) framework. When an Authorization Server processes user consent, it enriches the authorization details with cryptographic proof of user confirmation, supporting accountability, compliance, and dispute resolution in scenarios where autonomous agents act on behalf of users.
